mapper.insert: /* SmsBadwordMapper.insertBadwordManage */ INSERT INTO BADWORD ( ID, KEYWORD, KEYWORD_NORMALIZED, CATEGORY, MATCH_TYPE, SEVERITY, SOURCE, IS_ACTIVE, CREATED_AT, CREATED_BY, UPDATED_AT, UPDATED_BY ) VALUES ( BADWORD_SEQ.NEXTVAL, #{keyword}, #{keywordNormalized}, #{category}, #{matchType}, #{severity}, #{source}, #{isActive}, #{regDt}, #{regId}, #{modDt}, #{modId} )
mapper.update: /* SmsBadwordMapper.updateBadwordManage */ UPDATE BADWORD SET KEYWORD = #{keyword}, KEYWORD_NORMALIZED = #{keywordNormalized}, CATEGORY = #{category}, MATCH_TYPE = #{matchType}, SEVERITY = #{severity}, SOURCE = #{source}, IS_ACTIVE = #{isActive}, CREATED_AT = #{regDt}, CREATED_BY = #{regId}, UPDATED_AT = #{modDt}, UPDATED_BY = #{modId} WHERE ID = #{id}
